---
title: "Research"
toc: false

header-includes: |
    <style>
    h1.title {
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 15px;
    }
    </style>
---

\

## Working Papers

- Rent Control and Tenant Lock-In under Energy and Climate Shocks<br>
  &emsp; <span class="co-author">with Houde, S. and Mayr, H</span>


## Journal Publications

<ol reversed>
  <!-- --- -->
  <!-- <li> -->
  <!--   **Title**<br> -->
  <!--   &emsp; Kishida, T.<br> -->
  <!--   &emsp; *Journal Name*, 2025<span class="co-author">, xx-xx</span><br> -->
  <!-- </li> -->
  <!-- --- -->
  <li>
    **Deforestation and Children: Consequences for Paediatric Malaria and Educational Attainment in Indonesia**<br>
    &emsp; <span class="author-self">Kishida, T.</span>
    <span class="co-author">, Ito, T., Yamamoto, Y.</span><br>
    &emsp; ***Journal of Development Studies***, 2024
    <span class="co-author">, 61(3), 424–441.</span><br>
    &emsp; +Abstract | +BibTex | [PDF](https://takaakikishida.github.io/research/file/2024_JDS_Kishida_Deforestation_and_Children.pdf){target="_blank"} | [Journal Website](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/00220388.2024.2404561){target="_blank"}<br>
    ![](/image/forest_loss_2012.jpeg)
  </li>
</ol>


## Work in Progress

- Air Pollution and Productivity: Evidence from High-Resolution Spatiotemporal Data and Nationally Representative Surveys in 50 Countries


## Other Journal Publications (Pre-PhD/Collaborative/Interdisciplinary Work)

<!-- https://stackoverflow.com/questions/77771258/can-quarto-render-a-descending-ordered-markdown-list-into-revealjs -->

Five papers published in development and public health journals (as a co-author).
